arch.caption: A buyer searches the marketplace, their inquiry reaches a brokerage as a lead, and the secure core runs it all in real time.

intro.title: About me
intro.p1: I'm Magaiver, a Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience designing and building scalable SaaS platforms and AI-powered products.
intro.p2: I work end-to-end across frontend and backend — designing architectures, modeling databases and shipping production systems. My core stack is Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Fastify, PostgreSQL and Drizzle or Prisma.
intro.p3: I'm currently building PropAI OS, a multi-tenant real-estate operating system for US brokerages — tenant isolation with PostgreSQL Row-Level Security, semantic search with pgvector and an async AI pipeline on BullMQ.
intro.p4: I apply Clean Architecture, DDD and API-first design, and integrate LLMs, computer vision and embeddings into production-grade, cost-controlled workflows.
intro.p5: My goal is to build systems that generate real business impact — combining technical quality, scalability and a relentless focus on the user.
